mapper.select: SELECT STORE_ID as storeId, STORE_NAME as storeName, STORE_ADDR as storeAddr, STORE_PHONE as storePhone, CATEGORY as category, RATING as rating, DIBS_COUNT as dibsCount, REVIEW_COUNT as reviewCount, STORE_PICTURE as storePicture FROM STORE WHERE STATUS = '승인' AND RATING > 0 ORDER BY RATING DESC, REVIEW_COUNT DESC

SELECT STORE_ID as storeId, STORE_NAME as storeName, STORE_ADDR as storeAddr, STORE_PHONE as storePhone, CATEGORY as category, RATING as rating, REVIEW_COUNT as reviewCount, STORE_PICTURE as storePicture FROM STORE WHERE STATUS = '승인' AND CATEGORY = #{category} AND RATING > 0 ORDER BY RATING DESC, REVIEW_COUNT DESC

SELECT STORE_ID as storeId, STORE_NAME as storeName, STORE_ADDR as storeAddr, STORE_PHONE as storePhone, CATEGORY as category, RATING as rating, REVIEW_COUNT as reviewCount, STORE_PICTURE as storePicture FROM STORE WHERE STATUS = '승인' AND RATING >= #{rating} ORDER BY RATING DESC, REVIEW_COUNT DESC
